vision: Build a data-driven, people-first supply chain operation across LATAM — fewer fires, more foresight.

pillars.name: Data Foundations
pillars.summary: Trustworthy master data and clean domains as the bedrock for every decision.

pillars.name: Operational Excellence
pillars.summary: Standard S&OP rhythm, MRO discipline and end-to-end visibility across plants.

pillars.name: Team & Culture
pillars.summary: Develop leaders, recognize impact, and create the conditions for ownership.
